catalogue.description: Read-only AI gateway diagnostics: provider state, feature flags, task routing, and request/failure counters. Does not own AI provider logic — that lives in core/runtime/ai/.
Cog management, server stats, diagnostics
Bot health, latency, and system diagnostics
Per-guild moderation/cleanup event logging — channel selection, auto-create, and audit (S7)
Unified hub for moderation, channels, roles, cleanup, setup
Read-only browsing of platform settings, bindings, and audit history (S5)
Interface gallery — browse UI patterns, all fake & safe
Progression, roles, and community activities
Live server activity dashboard — leaders, level-ups, game stats
Live member-count channels (total · humans · bots)
Member greetings, farewells, and an optional entry role
Daily coins, work, shop, balance
Item management and crafting
Mining minigame and resource collection

Deterministic Bloons Tower Defense 6 assistant — tower/hero/map lookups, round threat summaries, and CHIMPS-mode guidance. Built on validated fixtures; consumes the AI gateway only when explicitly enabled (Module 5).
Blackjack card game
Collaborative counting game
1v1 duel battles
Competitive games and channel activities
Rock Paper Scissors: quick play, PvP, bot matches, tournaments
Word-chaining game
Channel and category creation, deletion, and restrictions
Time-based and XP-based automatic role assignment
Spam, invite links, excessive caps, and mass-mention filtering
Prohibited words, command deletion, channel hygiene
Warnings, timeouts, bans, mod logs
Proof submission and exclusive access sessions
Server leaderboards for XP, coins, and games
Experience points, levels, and leaderboards
A leafy little easter-egg panel — wisdom and number trivia
General bot commands and information
Interactive help menu and command discovery
General utility commands

bugs.title: "d67 dart paragon" misread as upgrade path "0-6-7" (paragon degree ignored)
bugs.summary: asked *"whats the damage of a d67 dart"* and *"a d67 dart praragon"*, SuperBot replied *"A 0-6-7 Dart Paragon doesn't exist — upgrade tiers cap at 5, so the maximum is 0-5-5."* It read the shorthand "d67" = degree 67 as an upgrade-path code "0-6-7". Paragons have degrees 1-100 (…

bugs.title: !coglist infinite "assumed from" command-resolution loop
bugs.summary: typing !coglist (or !cogs) made SuperBot spam "↩️ Ran !coglist — assumed from !coglist." endlessly — it did not stop until the bot was restarted. A runaway message loop (channel spam + rate-limit risk).

bugs.title: 1v1 challenge timer keeps running after accept, overwrites the live duel
bugs.summary: "there is a problem with the deathmatch cog, the 1v1 vs player command accept timer seems to keep running while a match is active, and even when a match is completed it will default to 'player didn't respond in time etc'." The accept/decline challenge prompt's 30-second timer ke…

bugs.title: counting staff check trusts role *names*, not permissions (privilege bypass)
bugs.summary: "you could give yourself a role called 'admin' while the admin role did not have any actual permissions — the fact that it was named 'admin' overruled the bot's permission system and allowed users to execute admin commands." A non-privileged member who holds (or can self-assign)…

bugs.title: Hermes gateway crash-loops on restart (Telegram 409) + periodic status=1
bugs.summary: the hermes-gateway systemd service exits Main process exited, code=exited, status=1/FAILURE on (a) every systemctl restart — the new instance starts, prints the "Messaging platforms + cron scheduler" banner, then dies within ~1s — and (b) periodically while running (observed unp…

bugs.title: the "in ABR" qualifier is ignored by auto-grounding and the round-cash workflow
grounded facts, wrong assembly: lists mislabeled / badly grouped (the claim-assembly class) — PARTIALLY FIXED (MK-related family)
"420 farm" income freelanced on the general path (keyword gap)
bugs.summary: "how much money does a 420 farm make" → invented economy ($45 bunches, "$1,725/round", invented build costs). No router keyword matched ("farm" is dropped from the entity matcher as ≤4 chars; "banana" absent; "420" can't route — FourTwenty owns it), so the model freelanced on th…

bugs.title: conversation-meta question answered with the BTD6 data refusal
bugs.summary: "what is the last message you can see" → "I don't have verified BTD6 data… (55.1)". The reply legitimately quoted the prior Desperado turns; the guard treated those names as ungrounded and the floor copy is a non-sequitur for a non-BTD6 question.

bugs.title: conversation carryover unreachable: pronoun follow-ups never route BTD6
bugs.summary: "does the navarch of seas paragon make coin" answered correctly, then "does it make coins at the end of the round?" refused. Same shape: "which of those items can damage lead" after the Geraldo list.

bugs.title: BUG-0003 recurrence in the model loop: the tool laundered a misread quantity ($120,743,025)
bugs.summary: "how much do 10 041 despos cost on impop" → "$120,743,025" (= 10,041 × $12,025) despite the grounding line carrying the correct "×10 towers → Impoppable $120,250".

bugs.title: r-shorthand round projection answered with the wrong total (cumulative-from-round-1 mislabel)
bugs.summary: "How much do I have on r70 if I had 26932 at the end of r53" → "At the end of round 70, you would have a total of $71,315.20" (plus a correct $29,386.70 rounds-54-70 breakdown). $71,315.20 is the cumulative from round 1 through 70 — not the user's scenario. Truth: 26,932 + 29,38…

bugs.title: "despos" hallucinated as Plasma Monkey Fan Club (unguarded general path)
bugs.summary: "@SuperBot how much do 10 041 despos cost on impop" → "A single Plasma Monkey Fan Club (Despo) costs $54,000 on Impoppable. For 10,041 Despos: 10,041 × $54,000 = $542,214,000 (542.2 million)."

bugs.title: Elite boss HP answered with the Standard table labeled "Elite"
bugs.summary: "@SuperBot what is the hp of elite lych per tier" → "Elite Lych health per tier: Tier 1: 14,000 … Tier 5: 2,100,000" — those are the Standard Lych figures. Elite Lych is 30,000 / 180,000 / 1,100,000 / 4,800,000 / 24,000,000 (2-11× higher).

bugs.title: Round-cash question misrouted to the no-data denial
bugs.summary: user asked "@SuperBot lets say i have 8094$ at round 60, what is the cash that i will get by going to round 68" → bot replied "I don't have verified BTD6 data to answer that for the current game version (55.1). I won't state names or numbers I can't ground in my data — try askin…

commands.name: force
commands.brief: Overrides channel restrictions and runs a command (admins only).

commands.name: ai
commands.brief: Open the AI Platform panel.

commands.name: aimenu
commands.brief: Open the AI Platform panel (alias for ``!ai``).

commands.name: aimenu
commands.brief: Open the AI Platform panel (administrator only).

commands.name: forget
commands.brief: Flush the chat-memory cache for THIS channel.

commands.name: policy
commands.brief: Show the effective AI policy for a channel (dry-run resolver).

commands.name: readiness
commands.brief: Run the full AI readiness chain check.

commands.name: settings
commands.brief: Open the AI Platform settings panel directly.

commands.name: support-report
commands.brief: Render a copy-pasteable support report from recent audit (PR-H).

commands.name: why-no-response
commands.brief: Show the most recent denials / skips for this guild.

commands.name: admin
commands.brief: Open the Admin control panel (administrator only).

commands.name: adminmenu
commands.brief: Open the interactive admin control panel.

commands.name: cog
commands.brief: Load, unload, or reload a cog by name (underscores and _cog suffix optional).

commands.name: coglist
commands.brief: Open the interactive cog manager — the panel's 📋 Cog List button.

commands.name: loadall
commands.brief: Load all unloaded cogs, skipping already-loaded ones.

commands.name: loglevel
commands.brief: Change the bot log level (DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR/CRITICAL).

commands.name: restart
commands.brief: Request a graceful restart through the lifecycle service.

commands.name: serverstats
commands.brief: Display server statistics.

commands.name: slashes
commands.brief: List currently-registered slash commands (admin only).

commands.name: syncslash
commands.brief: Sync the app-command tree for slash commands (owner only).

commands.name: unloadall
commands.brief: Unload all loaded cogs except this one.

commands.name: automod
commands.brief: Show the current automod policy for this server.

commands.name: btd6
commands.brief: Open the BTD6 panel.

commands.name: btd6menu
commands.brief: Open the BTD6 panel (alias for ``!btd6``).

commands.name: btd6menu
commands.brief: Open the BTD6 panel.

commands.name: ask
commands.brief: Deterministic Q&A. Module 5 adds optional AI augmentation.

commands.name: ctteam
commands.brief: View or set this server's CT team (paste the bracket group id / URL).

commands.name: btd6events
commands.brief: BTD6 live events, leaderboards, and data-source diagnostics.

commands.name: event
commands.brief: Show one specific BTD6 event with its tower restrictions.

commands.name: grounding
commands.brief: Show the grounding facts that fed an AI response (PR-D).

commands.name: latest-data
commands.brief: Show newest fact envelope per entity_kind (PR-D).

commands.name: leaderboard
commands.brief: Top-N race or boss leaderboard. No event_id = newest active.

commands.name: live
commands.brief: Show recent live events for ``kind`` (race / boss / ct / odyssey / event).

commands.name: refresh-source
commands.brief: Manually refresh one Ninja Kiwi source (staff-only).

commands.name: source-health
commands.brief: Show source registry freshness (PR-D).

commands.name: sources
commands.brief: List BTD6 source registry rows.

commands.name: btd6ops
commands.brief: BTD6 ingestion operations (staff readable; toggles are admin).

commands.name: announcechannel
commands.brief: Set/clear the BTD6 new-version announcement channel (administrator).

commands.name: seed-data
commands.brief: Seed the Postgres data store from the bundled files (administrator).

commands.name: btd6ref
commands.brief: BTD6 reference lookups (towers / heroes / rounds / relics / CT).

commands.name: ct
commands.brief: Browse active Contested Territory events and their relic tiles.

settings.purpose: Settings keys owned by the AI Platform subsystem (cogs.ai_cog).
Settings keys owned by the Automod subsystem (cogs.automod_cog).
BTD6 source-cache settings keys — **reserved, not yet wired** (M3B).
Settings keys owned by the Counters subsystem (cogs.counters_cog).
Settings keys owned by the Economy subsystem (cogs.economy_cog).
Settings keys shared by game subsystems.
Settings keys owned by the governance runtime (``governance/``).
Settings keys owned by the server-logging service (services.server_logging).
Settings keys owned by the Moderation subsystem (cogs.moderation_cog).
Settings keys owned by the Role subsystem (cogs.role_cog).
Settings keys owned by the Welcome subsystem (cogs.welcome_cog).
Settings keys owned by the XP subsystem (cogs.xp_cog).
